name: SlashNext
description: Real-time phishing defense platform using SEER threat detection cloud to analyze URLs and emails for phishing, BEC, scam, and malware with 99%+ accuracy

actions.name: URL Reputation
actions.description: Analyze a URL for phishing, malware, and other threats with real-time verdict

actions.name: URL Scan
actions.description: Perform a real-time scan of a URL using the SEER threat detection cloud

actions.name: URL Scan Sync
actions.description: Perform a synchronous URL scan and wait for results including verdict, screenshot, and HTML

parameters.name: extended_info
parameters.description: Include extended information (screenshot, HTML, rendered text)

actions.name: Host Reputation
actions.description: Retrieve reputation information for a specific host or domain

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: Hostname or domain to check reputation for

actions.name: Get Host URLs
actions.description: Retrieve all URLs associated with a host that have been scanned

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of URLs to return

actions.name: Download Screenshot
actions.description: Download a screenshot captured during URL scanning for forensic analysis

parameters.name: scanid
parameters.description: Scan ID to download screenshot for

actions.name: Download HTML
actions.description: Download the rendered HTML captured during URL scanning

parameters.name: scanid
parameters.description: Scan ID to download HTML for
